label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about Oleksander's wife's attitude toward his stay with the lion in the cage. The options are indifferent, objective, opposed, or supportive. Looking back at the text, there's a part where it says, "when he first told me about the plan I was very scared. But I decided to support my husband." That's a direct quote from his wife, Olena. So even though she was scared, she decided to support him. That would mean her attitude was supportive. The answer should be (D) supportive. The other options don't fit because
